description_long: This modern bungalow features a clean, cubic design with a flat roof and white exterior walls. The property includes a spacious wooden deck, a rectangular swimming pool, and several outdoor lounge areas with sunbeds and tables. Large glass doors and windows provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor living spaces. The landscaping includes palm trees, a flowering tree, and a small deciduous tree, enhancing the tropical and contemporary feel. A driveway with a parked car leads to the main entrance, which is subtly integrated into the minimalist facade. The overall layout emphasizes open, functional outdoor spaces and a seamless indoor-outdoor transition.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white bungalow with a wooden deck, pool, and lush landscaping, featuring large windows and a minimalist driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with car, pool, deck, and palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white wall with minimal windows and the driveway extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear side view displaying the pool, deck, and more of the outdoor lounge area with trees and seating.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the large glass doors, pool, deck, and outdoor furniture, with lush landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large glass doors and scattered windows
